settings.title: Personal Styling
settings.body: Curated scarf-and-accessory pairings tailored to your wardrobe, season, and occasion.

settings.title: Gift Concierge
settings.body: Thoughtful gift selection, elegant packaging, and an optional hand-written note.

settings.title: Care & Restoration
settings.body: Personalised guidance on caring for your silk pieces so they remain beautiful for years.

settings.intro: Lumière Silk offers a small set of personal services designed to make every piece feel meaningful — from selecting the right scarf, to wrapping the perfect gift, to caring for it long after.
